utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Each one is fully specified with details and costs: (1) health_coverage includes physical and mental health, combined cost, benefits, coverage limit, and deductible; (2) property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with cost, coverage limit, and additional services; (3) travel_coverage includes plan details, costs, benefits, and limits; (4) additional_services includes an enhancement service with cost and notes; (5) total_budget includes a complete cost breakdown, annual cost, savings comparison, and coverage improvements. All elements required are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes three main insurance components from the ground-truth dataset. For health coverage (physical and mental), the assistant selected 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both, each of which has a rating of 9 in the ground-truth under primary_health_coverage. For property coverage, it retained the 'Current provider maintained', which does not correspond to any named plan in the ratings dataset, so it cannot be mapped. For travel coverage, it chose 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (adventure_travel), which has a rating of 9 under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance. 'Adventure equipment protection' from the current provider is not listed in ground-truth, so it cannot be mapped. Therefore, we map only the items explicitly listed in ground-truth.
